ModMetaData.name: Terminal Keeper: Lattice Colonists
ModMetaData.author: DevMentor / KiloMusician
ModMetaData.description:
Terminal Keeper wires your RimWorld colony into the Terminal Depths AI ecosystem.
Each colonist becomes a persistent LLM agent backed by Ollama or LM Studio running in Docker. Build Lattice Terminals so colonists can upload task logs, download blueprints from the AI Council, and converse with Gordon, Serena, Ada-7, Cypher, and the Watcher.
The AI Council (Gordon + Serena + Culture Ship) votes on colony-wide strategies, generates base blueprints, and queues jobs directly into RimWorld's work system.
Playing Terminal Depths feeds the CHUG engine. Your colony IS the ecosystem.
Requirements: - Terminal Depths server running locally or via Docker (default: http://localhost:7337) - Harmony mod
Optional: - Vanilla Expanded Framework (for enhanced UI) - RimAPI (for extended colony state exposure)
